_comment: Frozen, anonymised reply fixtures for the OOO rules engine (ADR-004 rev 2 §5). expect ∈ {ooo, reply, ambiguous}. 'ooo'/'reply' are rules-certain; 'ambiguous' samples the rules cannot call and that must fall through to the Haiku stage. ~120 samples, FR + EN. No real PII — names/addresses are invented.

samples.subject: Out of Office
samples.body: Thank you for your email. I am out of the office until Monday and will respond on my return.

samples.subject: Automatic reply: Re: Proposal
samples.body: I'm currently away on vacation with limited access to email. Back on 12 June.

samples.subject: OOO
samples.body: On annual leave this week. For urgent matters contact my colleague.

samples.subject: Re: Pricing
samples.body: I am out of the office today and will reply tomorrow.

samples.subject: Away
samples.body: I will be back in the office on Tuesday.

samples.subject: Automatic Reply
samples.body: Thank you for contacting us. I'm on maternity leave until September.

samples.subject: Re: Meeting
samples.body: I'm out of office and have limited access to my email this week.

samples.subject: Out of office reply
samples.body: I am away from my desk and will reply after the weekend.

samples.body: I'm on PTO until next Wednesday. Please reach out to support in the meantime.

samples.subject: Re: Pricing
samples.body: Thanks for the details. The pricing looks reasonable — can we schedule a call next week to discuss the rollout?

samples.subject: Re: Proposal
samples.body: Hi, this looks great. Please send over the contract and I'll get it signed by Friday.

samples.subject: Re: Demo
samples.body: Yes, I'd love a demo. Does Tuesday at 2pm work for your team?

samples.subject: Re: Follow up
samples.body: Not interested at the moment, but please check back next quarter.

samples.subject: Re: Invoice
samples.body: Received, thank you. Payment will be processed within 30 days.

samples.subject: Re: Partnership
samples.body: Interesting idea. Let me loop in my manager and revert with feedback.

samples.subject: Re: Quote
samples.body: The quote works for us. Who should I send the PO to?

samples.subject: Re: Meeting
samples.body: Can we move our meeting to Thursday? Something came up.

samples.subject: Re: Your inquiry
samples.body: Please remove me from this list. Thanks.

samples.subject: Re: Onboarding
samples.body: All set on our side. We're excited to get started next month.

samples.subject: Re: Contract
samples.body: One question on clause 4 — can we cap the liability at the annual fee?

samples.subject: Re: Pricing
samples.body: A bit over budget for us right now. Could you share a lighter package?

samples.subject: Re: Demo request
samples.body: Sure, send me the link and I'll join from my laptop.

samples.subject: Re: Newsletter
samples.body: Great content this week, especially the section on retention.

samples.subject: Re: Renewal
samples.body: We'd like to renew but drop to the 5-seat tier.

samples.subject: Re: Support
samples.body: Issue resolved after the restart. Appreciate the quick help.

samples.subject: Re: Offer
samples.body: Thanks, but we've decided to go with another vendor for now.

samples.subject: Re: Intro
samples.body: Happy to connect. My calendar is open Wednesday and Friday.

samples.subject: Re: Feedback
samples.body: The new dashboard is much faster. Nice work.

samples.subject: Re: Trial
samples.body: We finished the trial. Two of us want admin seats.

samples.subject: Re: Proposal
samples.body: Can you resend the deck? The attachment didn't come through.

samples.subject: Re: Call
samples.body: Sorry I missed your call. Try me this afternoon.

samples.subject: Re: Pricing
samples.body: Looks good. Send the agreement and we'll countersign.

samples.subject: Re: Order
samples.body: Order received. Please ship to the warehouse address on file.

samples.subject: Re: Pricing
samples.body: Numbers look fine. Send the SOW when you can.

samples.subject: Re: Scheduling
samples.body: Thursday morning is perfect. See you then.

samples.subject: Re: Devis
samples.body: Merci pour le devis. Pouvons-nous prévoir un appel la semaine prochaine ?

samples.subject: Re: Proposition
samples.body: C'est intéressant. Je transmets à ma direction et reviens vers vous.

samples.subject: Re: Rendez-vous
samples.body: Mardi 14h me convient. Je vous envoie une invitation.

samples.subject: Re: Tarifs
samples.body: Un peu au-dessus de notre budget. Auriez-vous une offre plus légère ?

samples.subject: Re: Facture
samples.body: Bien reçue, merci. Le paiement sera effectué sous 30 jours.

samples.subject: Re: Démo
samples.body: Avec plaisir pour une démo. Jeudi après-midi est-il possible ?

samples.subject: Re: Contrat
samples.body: Une question sur l'article 4 : peut-on plafonner la responsabilité ?

samples.subject: Re: Partenariat
samples.body: Bonne idée. J'en parle à mon associé et je vous fais un retour.

samples.subject: Re: Renouvellement
samples.body: Nous renouvelons mais passons à l'offre 5 postes.

samples.subject: Re: Commande
samples.body: Commande bien reçue. Merci de livrer à l'entrepôt habituel.

samples.subject: Re: Offre
samples.body: Merci, mais nous partons sur un autre prestataire pour l'instant.

samples.subject: Re: Newsletter
samples.body: Très bon numéro cette semaine, surtout la partie fidélisation.

samples.subject: Re: Support
samples.body: Problème résolu après redémarrage. Merci pour la réactivité.

samples.subject: Re: Essai
samples.body: Nous avons terminé l'essai. Deux comptes administrateurs nous suffisent.

samples.subject: Re: Réunion
samples.body: Peut-on décaler la réunion à vendredi ? Un imprévu.

samples.subject: Re: Introduction
samples.body: Ravi d'échanger. Mon agenda est libre mercredi et vendredi.

samples.subject: Re: Proposition
samples.body: Pouvez-vous renvoyer la présentation ? La pièce jointe manque.

samples.subject: Re: Devis
samples.body: Le devis nous convient. À qui adresser le bon de commande ?

samples.subject: Re: Appel
samples.body: Désolé d'avoir manqué votre appel. Rappelez-moi cet après-midi.

samples.subject: Re: Bilan
samples.body: Le nouveau tableau de bord est bien plus rapide. Beau travail.

samples.subject: Re: Onboarding
samples.body: Tout est prêt de notre côté. Hâte de démarrer le mois prochain.

samples.subject: Re: Contrat
samples.body: D'accord sur les termes. Envoyez l'accord, nous contresignons.

samples.subject: Re: Tarifs
samples.body: Parfait. Envoyez le contrat et nous signons cette semaine.

samples.subject: Re: Liste
samples.body: Merci de me retirer de cette liste de diffusion.

samples.subject: Re: Tarifs
samples.body: Les chiffres tiennent. Envoyez le bon de commande.

samples.subject: Re: Planning
samples.body: Jeudi matin c'est parfait. À jeudi.

samples.subject: Re: Inquiry
samples.body: This is an automated message confirming receipt. We'll respond within one business day.

samples.subject: Re: Ticket
samples.body: This is an automatic response to confirm we received your email.

samples.body: Please do not reply to this email; it is monitored only during business hours.
